subject: Supplier invoice
snippet: Hey James, I just got the invoice from Ramirez Roasters and the total doesn't ma...
body: Hey James, I just got the invoice from Ramirez Roasters and the total doesn't match what we agreed on last month â€” they billed us for 15 bags of the Colombian instead of 12. Can you double check the delivery log before I pay this? Don't want to overpay again like last time.

subject: Re: Supplier invoice
snippet: Good catch. I checked the delivery log â€” we did only receive 12 bags on the 24th...
body: Good catch. I checked the delivery log â€” we did only receive 12 bags on the 24th. I emailed their billing dept and asked for a corrected invoice. Hold off on paying until we hear back, should be by Friday.

subject: Staffing schedule
snippet: James, here's the draft schedule for next week. I moved Priya to Saturday mornin...
body: James, here's the draft schedule for next week. I moved Priya to Saturday mornings since she asked for Sunday off, and put Marcus on close all week since he's trained on the register now. Let me know if this works before I post it.

subject: Re: Staffing schedule
snippet: Looks solid overall. Can we get one more person on Saturday afternoon though? Th...
body: Looks solid overall. Can we get one more person on Saturday afternoon though? That's usually our busiest window and right now it's just Marcus alone from 1-4.

subject: Re: Staffing schedule
snippet: Added Priya for 1-4 on Saturday too, she said she's fine with the extra hours. P...
body: Added Priya for 1-4 on Saturday too, she said she's fine with the extra hours. Posting the final version on the board now â€” thanks for the quick turnaround.

subject: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Reminder â€” Q2 estimated tax payment is due July 15th. Our accountant sent over t...
body: Reminder â€” Q2 estimated tax payment is due July 15th. Our accountant sent over the worksheet, looks like we owe about $4,200 based on the shop's income this quarter. Can you look over the numbers tonight?

subject: Re: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Just went through it. Numbers look right to me, though I think we can bump up th...
body: Just went through it. Numbers look right to me, though I think we can bump up the equipment depreciation deduction slightly since we bought that new espresso machine in April. Want me to call Denise tomorrow to confirm before we file?

subject: Re: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Yes please, call her in the morning if you can. Also let's set aside the money i...
body: Yes please, call her in the morning if you can. Also let's set aside the money in the tax savings account today so we're not scrambling on the 14th like last quarter.

subject: Re: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Already transferred $4,200 into savings. Talked to Denise briefly â€” she'll confi...
body: Already transferred $4,200 into savings. Talked to Denise briefly â€” she'll confirm the depreciation number by tomorrow. We're in good shape either way.

subject: Customer review reply
snippet: Saw a one-star review come in this morning complaining about a 20 minute wait an...
body: Saw a one-star review come in this morning complaining about a 20 minute wait and a cold latte. It's from a regular too, username 'hikermom21'. Want me to respond or would you rather handle this one?

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: I'll take this one since I remember her from last week. Can you pull up what hap...
body: I'll take this one since I remember her from last week. Can you pull up what happened that morning â€” were we short staffed?

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: Yeah, Marcus called out sick and we didn't get a sub in time, so it was just me ...
body: Yeah, Marcus called out sick and we didn't get a sub in time, so it was just me and Priya during the rush. I already made a note in the staffing doc so we build in backup coverage going forward.

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: Drafted a reply apologizing and offering her a free drink on her next visit. Sen...
body: Drafted a reply apologizing and offering her a free drink on her next visit. Sending it now â€” let me know if you think the tone is right before I post it publicly.

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: Read it, tone is good â€” warm but not overly apologetic. Posted it under the revi...
body: Read it, tone is good â€” warm but not overly apologetic. Posted it under the review just now. I'll flag her ticket at the register so whoever's on shift honors the free drink.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Any chance you're free for lunch Thursday? I have a break between appointments a...
body: Any chance you're free for lunch Thursday? I have a break between appointments around noon and thought it'd be nice to grab something other than shop leftovers for once.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Thursday works for me, I can close the register early for a bit. Let's do that T...
body: Thursday works for me, I can close the register early for a bit. Let's do that Thai place on 5th, I've been craving the pad see ew all week.

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: It's been forever since we just sat down for coffee without talking about the sh...
body: It's been forever since we just sat down for coffee without talking about the shop or the kids' schedules. You free Tuesday morning before opening?

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: I'd like that. We could go to that new place two blocks over instead of making o...
body: I'd like that. We could go to that new place two blocks over instead of making our own for once â€” feels weird but might be fun to see how someone else does it.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Ha, agreed, feels like cheating but let's do it. 8am before I drop the kids off?...
body: Ha, agreed, feels like cheating but let's do it. 8am before I drop the kids off? I'll make sure Mia's backpack is packed the night before so we're not rushing.

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Okay, your mom's 65th is coming up fast. I'm thinking brunch at that garden rest...
body: Okay, your mom's 65th is coming up fast. I'm thinking brunch at that garden restaurant she loves, Sunday the 12th. Should we invite your brother's family too or keep it small?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Let's invite them, she'd love having the grandkids there. I'll call the restaura...
body: Let's invite them, she'd love having the grandkids there. I'll call the restaurant tomorrow to see if they can do a table for ten near the patio.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Perfect. I'll order a cake from that bakery she always mentions â€” the lemon one ...
body: Perfect. I'll order a cake from that bakery she always mentions â€” the lemon one with the little candied flowers. Should we do a small gift too or just the brunch?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Let's get her that scarf she pointed out last month at the market. I'll swing by...
body: Let's get her that scarf she pointed out last month at the market. I'll swing by there Saturday and grab it before we head over Sunday morning.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Got the renewal notice for the shop's liability insurance. Premium's going up al...
body: Got the renewal notice for the shop's liability insurance. Premium's going up almost 15% this year. Want me to call around for quotes or just renew with the same company?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Let's at least get two other quotes before we decide, 15% is a big jump. Can you...
body: Let's at least get two other quotes before we decide, 15% is a big jump. Can you ask if they'll price match if we find something cheaper elsewhere?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Called two other brokers today. One quote came back lower by about $600 a year b...
body: Called two other brokers today. One quote came back lower by about $600 a year but with a higher deductible. Still waiting on the third.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: The higher deductible makes me nervous given how old our equipment is. Let's see...
body: The higher deductible makes me nervous given how old our equipment is. Let's see the third quote before deciding, but I'm leaning toward staying if the difference is small.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Third quote came in almost identical to what we're currently paying. I think we ...
body: Third quote came in almost identical to what we're currently paying. I think we just renew with our current company then and skip the hassle of switching.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Quick question â€” did we ever get the invoice from the paper goods vendor for las...
body: Quick question â€” did we ever get the invoice from the paper goods vendor for last month's cup order? I don't see it in the folder and they usually send it by the 5th.

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: I checked my email, nothing came through yet either. I'll call them this afterno...
body: I checked my email, nothing came through yet either. I'll call them this afternoon and ask them to resend it, might've gotten caught in spam.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Landlord sent the lease renewal paperwork. They want to raise rent by $150 a mon...
body: Landlord sent the lease renewal paperwork. They want to raise rent by $150 a month if we sign another year. Should we try to negotiate or just take it?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: That's a bigger jump than last year. Let's ask if they'll do $75 instead, especi...
body: That's a bigger jump than last year. Let's ask if they'll do $75 instead, especially since we've never been late on rent and we fixed that leak ourselves last winter.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: I emailed the property manager with that ask. She said she'll check with the own...
body: I emailed the property manager with that ask. She said she'll check with the owner and get back to us by Friday. Fingers crossed they go for it.

subject: Newsletter â€” this week's reads
snippet: Sending you a few things I bookmarked this week â€” there's a good piece on small ...
body: Sending you a few things I bookmarked this week â€” there's a good piece on small business tax changes and a really sweet article about a couple who opened a bakery in their 60s. Thought you'd like both.

subject: Re: Newsletter â€” this week's reads
snippet: Read the tax one on my break, definitely relevant to us for next year. The baker...
body: Read the tax one on my break, definitely relevant to us for next year. The bakery story made me a little emotional honestly, reminded me of why we started the shop in the first place.

subject: Re: Newsletter â€” this week's reads
snippet: Right? I teared up a little too. There's also a local newsletter roundup of new ...
body: Right? I teared up a little too. There's also a local newsletter roundup of new restaurants opening downtown, might be worth checking out as competition or just for date night.

subject: Re: Newsletter â€” this week's reads
snippet: Added a couple of those to our list for date night. Also bookmarked an article y...
body: Added a couple of those to our list for date night. Also bookmarked an article you sent last month about coffee sourcing trends â€” finally got around to reading it, really useful for when we talk to new suppliers.

subject: Schedule check â€” kids pickup
snippet: Can you get Mia and Leo from school tomorrow? I have a dentist appointment at 3:...
body: Can you get Mia and Leo from school tomorrow? I have a dentist appointment at 3:30 that's going to run right up against pickup time.

subject: Re: Schedule check â€” kids pickup
snippet: Yeah I can do it, I'll close a little early and have Darius cover the last hour....
body: Yeah I can do it, I'll close a little early and have Darius cover the last hour. What time does pickup end again, 3:45?

subject: Re: Schedule check â€” kids pickup
snippet: Yes, 3:45, but Leo's class sometimes runs a few minutes late from the after-scho...
body: Yes, 3:45, but Leo's class sometimes runs a few minutes late from the after-school art thing. Mia will probably already be waiting outside.

subject: Re: Schedule check â€” kids pickup
snippet: Got it, I'll grab Mia first then swing by Leo's room. Should I take them straigh...
body: Got it, I'll grab Mia first then swing by Leo's room. Should I take them straight home or do they have anywhere to be after?

subject: Re: Schedule check â€” kids pickup
snippet: Straight home is fine, no other plans. Thank you for covering this, I owe you on...
body: Straight home is fine, no other plans. Thank you for covering this, I owe you one â€” I'll pick them up the rest of the week so it evens out.

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: I've been looking at flights for the trip in August and prices are creeping up. ...
body: I've been looking at flights for the trip in August and prices are creeping up. Should we just book now before they go up more, or keep waiting to see if they drop?

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Let's just book it, we already know the dates work with the kids' school schedul...
body: Let's just book it, we already know the dates work with the kids' school schedule and the shop can handle us both being out that week. I'll transfer the money over tonight so you can book in the morning.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: What are we thinking for this weekend? I was hoping we could do something low-ke...
body: What are we thinking for this weekend? I was hoping we could do something low-key since we've both been running around nonstop with the shop lately.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Low-key sounds perfect. Maybe just a park day with the kids Saturday and then or...
body: Low-key sounds perfect. Maybe just a park day with the kids Saturday and then order in that night instead of cooking? Sunday I still want to get to the farmers market for supplies though.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: That works for me. I'll pack a picnic for the park so we're not tempted to buy s...
body: That works for me. I'll pack a picnic for the park so we're not tempted to buy snacks everywhere. Let's aim to leave by 10 before it gets too hot.

subject: McNichols build-out, updated numbers after the walkthrough
snippet: James, couple of revisions after we met the electrician and plumber on site...
body: James, couple of revisions after we met the electrician and the plumber on site. The panel upgrade came in higher than the original quote once we found the service was not rated for the second chair station, so that line is now 3,600 rather than what I first wrote you. The wash station also moved up to 3,300 after we had to reroute the drain to hit code, more than the earlier estimate. Better news on the exterior sign, the permit finally cleared so that item is no longer blocked and we are scheduled to hang it the week before your sign-off walkthrough. Everything else on the tracker still holds where it sits. Call me if you want to walk the deltas before you lock the budget.

subject: Re: booking, one change
snippet: Hey James, small thing before the new spot opens...
body: Hey James, small thing before the new spot opens. I know you have me down with Darius from way back, but Andre has been doing my shape-up the last few months and we got a good rhythm now, so go ahead and put me with Andre going forward. Still want to be there opening day, just wanted you to have it right on your list.
